## Final Accepted Amendments

### `fr-1-38f72f28`

finding_summary: `nix build` currently fails because `check_available_times_out_when_version_probe_hangs` depends on an external `sleep` command inside its fake `br --version` script. In the Nix sandbox that binary is unavailable, so the probe exits immediately and the assertion sees a non-timeout error instead of `BrError::BrTimeout`. affected_files: [`src/adapters/br_process.rs:1974`, `src/adapters/br_process.rs:1980`]. remediation_hint: rewrite the hanging fake `br` probe to avoid external binaries entirely (for example, use a pure-shell infinite loop or a small Rust helper) so the timeout behavior is deterministic under `nix build`.
